description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, dark gray roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a wide porch with white columns and railings, leading to a central entrance flanked by large windows. The property includes a paved driveway, a car parked to the side, and a backyard area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and patio furniture. Several medium-sized leafy trees are arranged around the house, providing shade and enhancing the suburban feel. The exterior walls are primarily white with black accents, and the windows are large and regularly spaced. The overall design is clean, geometric, and emphasizes outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, wide porch, large windows, a driveway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and outdoor furniture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, central entrance, driveway, car, and two trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, and the arrangement of trees along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio furniture, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and porch columns.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the pool area, patio furniture, and the side driveway with surrounding trees.
